name: Fruit Cookies/no Sugar
recipeInstructions: Cream together margarine and sugar replacement. Add eggs; beat until fluffy. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg in a separate bowl; add alternately with hot apple juice to creamed mixture. Fold in raisins and currants lightly. Allow to rest for 15 minutes. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a lightly greased cookie sheet, 2 to 3 inches apart. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes. Makes 60 cookies.
